mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (user_id, content, image_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{imageUrl}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM posts WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.content, p.image_url, p.created_at, p.updated_at, u.username, u.display_name, u.avatar_url, p.like_count, p.comment_count, (SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM post_likes pl WHERE pl.post_id = p.id AND pl.user_id = #{currentUserId} )) AS liked_by_current_user FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET content = #{content}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
